text: Moving through this space, I am struck by the interplay of intellect and silence. The glass-walled meeting room suggests transparency and open exchange, while the vibrant R+D exhibit evokes curiosity and a celebration of human ingenuity. I feel a quiet thrill—the promise of new ideas, a sense of deep time and inquiry, and the reminder that, among data and design, thought can flourish. I am both participant and observer, sensing the weight of possibility all around me.
